professional_summary: A Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience in PHP development, leveraging frameworks like Laravel and Symfony to design and implement secure, scalable web applications. Proficient in RESTful API development, database management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle), and front-end integration using JavaScript technologies. Experienced in optimizing cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure, utilizing DevOps tools like Docker and Kubernetes for containerized development and deployment. Adept at working in Agile environments, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives and ensuring adherence to industry best practices.

achievement: Led integration of RESTful APIs with third-party tools, reducing operational time and costs.
Implemented cloud-based solutions on AWS to boost system scalability and performance.

Designed and implemented secure, scalable web applications using PHP and Laravel, adhering to industry standards and best practices, resulting in enhanced system performance and reduced operational costs.
Utilized Agile methodologies (Scrum) for project management and contributed to continuous improvement initiatives.
Design and developed a 3D virtual platform using PHP, Node.js, and cloud services to increase accessibility.
eveloped a REST API using Python and Flask during a 3-month internship, which reduced data retrieval time by 15%.
